items.br: Extrai supervisores de assignment via BICC com vigencia, acao e business group. Utilizado para cargas analiticas de hierarquia de reporte.
items.en: Extracts assignment supervisors via BICC with effective dates, action, and business group. Used for analytical loads of reporting hierarchy.
items.es: Extrae supervisores de assignment vía BICC con vigencia, acción y business group. Utilizado para cargas analíticas de jerarquía de reporte.
